# Project Skills Migration Reference

Legacy project skill packages were removed after the gl8b migration.

## Current Source Layout

Use assets from:

- `.xtrm/skills/default/service-skills`

This location is the canonical source for installer assets, hook scripts, and migration docs tied to the service-skills set.

> **v2 (epic `xtrm-b86y5`):** the four former service-skills skills + the `service-skills-set`
> bundle were consolidated into the single `service-skills` skill (`skills/service-skills/`,
> mirrored to `.xtrm/skills/default/service-skills/`). Per-repo service skills now live at
> `.xtrm/skills/user/packs/<pack>/service-skills/services/<svc>/` with a generated
> `<repo>-services` umbrella; the installer + hooks ship under `service-skills/install/`.

## Installer Expectations

- `install-service-skills` tests and command paths should resolve assets from `.xtrm/skills/default/service-skills`
- Runtime activation still targets project-local `.claude/skills/*` through active skill links
